{{CharInfobox |Box title = Cadence |image = File:Cadence.png |gender = Female |hometown = Saxifrage Island |leader of = Saxifrage Gym |badge = Raucous Badge |speciality = Sound Type |hair colour = White}} '''{{PAGENAME}}''' is the Leader of [[Saxifrage Gym]] on [[Saxifrage Island]]. She specializes in [[Elemental Types (Prism)#Sound type|Sound-type]] Pokémon, and will confer the '''Raucous Badge''' and [[TMs (Prism)|TM79]] (Hyper Voice) upon defeat. She later appears as a trainer in the [[Spurge Gym|Spurge City Gym]]. ==Story== According to one of her Gym trainers, {{PAGENAME}} was once arrested for disturbing the peace. However, after becoming an inmate at the [[Saxifrage Prison|Prison]], she was given the Gym for how well she treated her Pokémon. ==Pokémon== ===Gym battle=== {{Party/HeaderPrism |Sprite=Cadence.png |Class=Leader |Name=[[Cadence]] |Location=Saxifrage Gym |Prize=4800 and

{{BattleDialogue |What's up?! I'm Cadence. I use the power of sound to enhance the capabilities of my Pokémon! The power of sound and music can change how one performs!
